calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-03-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Steven Weinkauf for San Francisco Public Administrator.

Mr. Weinkauf stated that he talked with Mr. Accornero several times about getting his Client to submit time records and that they are not going to do it. The First and Final Report and Account, etc. is taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-04-2017 Continued To Nov-01-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Steven Weinkauf for San Francisco Public Administrator.

Mr. Weinkauf stated he has had no contact with ARB, that he hasn't heard anything and that Mr. Accornero was going to contact them to see if they wanted to file anything. Mr. Weinkauf also stated that he is willing to withdraw his request for ARB's fees if they are not willing to defend, that he has never had contact with ARB and that he is uncomfortable communicating directly with them as they have Counsel. The First and Final Report and Account, etc. is continued to November 1, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Weinkauf is to inform Mr. Accornero to contact ARB.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-02-2017 Continued To Oct-04-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-18-2017 Continued To Oct-02-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Steven Weinkauf for San Francisco Public Administrator.

Mr. Accornero was present in Court, but stated that he is not making an appearance because he can't discuss the assignments. Mr. Weinkauf stated that he failed to file the Allowance or Rejection of Creditor's Claim, that he will get it filed and that the assignments were signed early on, but the Administrator was just informed recently. The Court advised Counsel that it wants something filed from the heir finder with respect to time spent on searches. The First and Final Account and Report, etc. is continued to October 2, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Those Persons Entitled To Distribution Of Estate
Off Calendar May-02-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Giulio Accornero for Stanley Hasegawa (Petitioner).
Steven Weinkauf for San Francisco Public Administrator.

Mr. Weinkauf stated that he has no objection, that it appears correct to him and that there is no objection by anyone else. Mr. Accornero stated that the parties are all siblings of the Decedent. The Court granted the Petition to Determine Those Persons Entitled to Distribution of Estate (order for the same signed in open Court).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
